meta_title: For Students: client workflow to Solve no portfolio (Advanced Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to client workflow and overcome no portfolio. A Advanced-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: Client Workflow to Solve No Portfolio (Checklist)
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with no portfolio. Master the professional client workflow for AI developers using Antigravity and Claude Code in this advanced checklist.
content.answer_block: The 'no portfolio' trap is solved by treating your side projects as high-stakes client deliverables. By implementing a standardized client workflow—leveraging automated scaffolding with Antigravity and rapid iteration via Claude Code—you transform raw code into professional-grade assets that demonstrate technical maturity and business-aligned problem solving to prospective employers.
content.intro:
The silence of a blank portfolio is deafening. You have the skills, you have the ambition, but your GitHub remains a graveyard of abandoned tutorials. You are trapped in the 'student loop,' where your code lacks the architectural rigor that separates hobbyists from hireable engineers. The industry doesn't care about your latest To-Do list app; they care about how you handle requirements, ambiguity, and deployment.

Today, we break that cycle. We are pivoting from 'student' to 'architect' by adopting a professional client workflow. By leveraging the automated precision of Antigravity and the autonomous reasoning of Claude Code, you will build projects that mirror enterprise-grade SaaS environments. This isn't just about writing code; it’s about engineering solutions that prove you can handle the pressure of a real-world production environment.

steps.title: Define the Business Requirement
steps.description: Before writing code, document the problem scope as if you were billing a client. This prevents scope creep and ensures your project has a clear 'Why'.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Act as a Senior Product Architect. Create a project specification document for an AI-powered data extraction tool. Include user stories, core API requirements, and success metrics for a production-ready MVP.
steps.claude_code_command: claude terminal 'Create a README.md and REQUIREMENTS.md based on the project scope provided by Antigravity.'

steps.title: Generate High-Fidelity Scaffolding
steps.description: Use Antigravity to generate a clean, modular architecture. This avoids the 'tutorial spaghetti' look and demonstrates you understand directory structures.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a production-ready folder structure for a Python-based FastAPI backend with integrated LangChain components. Ensure strict separation of concerns and include a docker-compose.yml file.
steps.claude_code_command: claude terminal 'Initialize the project file structure using the schema generated by Antigravity and verify all dependencies in pyproject.toml.'

steps.title: Implement Type-Safe Logic
steps.description: Professional code is type-safe. Use Claude Code to enforce strict typing throughout your business logic, which signals advanced proficiency.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor the core logic module to include Pydantic models for all API inputs and outputs. Ensure comprehensive error handling for LLM timeouts.
steps.claude_code_command: claude terminal 'Review the core logic files and refactor to use strict Pydantic models. Run mypy to ensure zero type errors.'

steps.title: Automate Integration Testing
steps.description: A client never accepts code without proof it works. Create automated tests that run on every commit.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a suite of pytest integration tests for the authentication and AI-inference modules. Mock the OpenAI API calls using responses.
steps.claude_code_command: claude terminal 'Generate a tests/ directory, write the integration tests, and execute them to ensure a 100% pass rate.'

steps.title: Document for Handoff
steps.description: The final stage of a professional workflow is the technical handoff. Create documentation that allows a new dev to start in minutes.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a comprehensive 'Developer Handoff' document. Include environment setup, API documentation via Swagger, and deployment instructions for AWS/GCP.
steps.claude_code_command: claude terminal 'Generate a HANDOFF.md file based on the completed project files and ensure all installation steps are accurate.'

pro_tips: Always commit with semantic versioning messages; it shows you understand release cycles.
Include a 'system architecture' diagram in your README; visuals communicate seniority faster than text.
Document your failures—include a 'Challenges Faced' section in your docs to show critical thinking.
Use environment variables for everything; never hardcode secrets, even in your first project.
Implement a 'Cleanup' script that automates environment teardown; it demonstrates respect for server costs.
content.next_steps: After completing this project, deploy it to a live cloud environment (Vercel or Render) and link the live URL directly in your resume header, not just your GitHub.
content.conversion_block: You are now equipped to build projects that demand respect rather than just 'passing' grades. Stop waiting for permission to be a professional. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
